summary: Iteration 38: Tested visual improvements for Infrastructure Sizing Planner. Most features working correctly. Found 1 bug: External DNS QPS auto-calculation not working (fields rendered as 'number' type instead of 'dnsPerServerCalculated'/'dnsAggregateCalculated').

ui_bugs.issue: External DNS QPS fields (edns-1, edns-2) are rendered as 'number' type instead of 'dnsPerServerCalculated'/'dnsAggregateCalculated'. Internal DNS fields (idns-1, idns-2) work correctly with auto-calculation showing '834' and Auto badge. External DNS shows placeholder '0' without auto-calculation.
ui_bugs.evidence: edns-1: type='number', placeholder='0', class contains 'w-16'. idns-1: type='text', placeholder='834', class contains 'w-24'

passed_tests: 1. Nav pills outline style - Inactive pills have bg-transparent with colored borders (e.g., border-green-400 for I DNS, border-teal-400 for E DNS) - PASS
2. Nav pills active style - Active pill (IPAM) has filled bg-blue-600 with shadow - PASS
3. Multiselect badges - External DNS vendor field shows selected items as horizontal badges (Microsoft, BIND, Cloudflare) with X buttons - PASS
4. Compact mode toggle - Button found, clicking toggles bg-primary/10 active state - PASS
5. Zebra striping - Alternating rows have bg-muted/5 class - PASS
6. Hover states - Question cells have hover:bg-muted/10 class - PASS
7. Progress bars - I DNS pill shows progress bar with width: 27.2727% (3/11 questions) - PASS
8. Progress indicators - Nav pills show X/Y format (e.g., 7/18 for IPAM) - PASS
9. Internal DNS QPS auto-calculation - Shows '834' with Auto badge based on 2500 IPs / 3 - PASS
10. External DNS QPS auto-calculation - FAIL (see bug above)
action_items: Fix External DNS QPS fields (edns-1, edns-2) to use dnsPerServerCalculated/dnsAggregateCalculated field types instead of number type. The detectFieldType function returns correct type but rendering uses wrong type.
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentQuestions.jsx lines 404-415: sectionPillStyles correctly defines outline styles with bg-transparent and colored borders for inactive pills
AssessmentQuestions.jsx lines 704-710: Progress bar implementation correctly shows at bottom of inactive pills with progress > 0
AssessmentQuestions.jsx lines 534-588: Auto-calculation logic for dnsAggregateCalculated/dnsPerServerCalculated is correct, but External DNS fields not using this code path
AssessmentQuestions.jsx lines 104-212: MultiSelectField correctly displays badges as horizontal row with flex-wrap gap-1.5
AssessmentQuestions.jsx lines 781-787: Zebra striping implemented with isEvenRow check and bg-muted/5 class
AssessmentQuestions.jsx lines 787: Hover state implemented with hover:bg-muted/10 class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual improvements mostly working. Key issue: External DNS QPS fields (edns-1, edns-2) not using auto-calculation. Compare with Internal DNS (idns-1, idns-2) which works correctly. The API returns correct fieldType (dnsPerServerCalculated/dnsAggregateCalculated) but frontend renders as 'number' type. Check detectFieldType function and renderField switch statement.

multiselect_badges.display: Horizontal row of badges above dropdown

compact_mode_toggle.location: Left of nav pills in sticky header

progress_bars.style: absolute bottom-0 left-0 h-0.5 bg-current opacity-30

external_dns.issue: Rendered as 'number' type instead of calculated type
external_dns.expected: Should show 834 with Auto badge like Internal DNS
